mapper.sql: SELECT s.id, s.application_case_id, ac.user_id, u.email AS user_email, ac.company_name, ac.job_title, s.mode, s.total_score, s.started_at, s.ended_at, s.created_at, s.source_snapshot, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM interview_question q WHERE q.interview_session_id = s.id AND q.deleted_at IS NULL ) AS question_count, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM interview_answer a JOIN interview_question q2 ON q2.id = a.question_id WHERE q2.interview_session_id = s.id AND q2.deleted_at IS NULL AND a.submission_status = 'COMPLETED' ) AS answered_count, (s.report IS NOT NULL AND s.report <> '') AS has_report FROM interview_session s JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = s.application_case_id JOIN users u ON u.id = ac.user_id
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM interview_session s JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = s.application_case_id JOIN users u ON u.id = ac.user_id WHERE s.deleted_at IS NULL AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL
AND ( ac.company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR ac.job_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND s.mode = #{mode}
AND s.report IS NOT NULL AND s.report <> ''
AND (s.report IS NULL OR s.report = '')

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM interview_session active JOIN application_case active_case ON active_case.id = active.application_case_id WHERE active.deleted_at IS NULL AND active_case.deleted_at IS NULL) AS total_sessions, (SELECT ROUND(AVG(active.total_score)) FROM interview_session active JOIN application_case active_case ON active_case.id = active.application_case_id WHERE active.total_score IS NOT NULL AND active.deleted_at IS NULL AND active_case.deleted_at IS NULL) AS avg_score, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_usage_log WHERE status = 'FAILED' AND feature_type LIKE 'INTERVIEW%') AS ai_failures, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM interview_media_analysis media JOIN interview_session active_session ON active_session.id = media.interview_session_id JOIN application_case active_case ON active_case.id = active_session.application_case_id WHERE active_session.deleted_at IS NULL AND active_case.deleted_at IS NULL) AS media_count
SELECT report FROM interview_session WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT l.id, l.user_id, u.email AS user_email, l.application_case_id, ac.company_name, ac.job_title, l.feature_type, l.error_message, l.created_at FROM ai_usage_log l JOIN users u ON u.id = l.user_id LEFT JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = l.application_case_id WHERE l.status = 'FAILED' AND l.feature_type LIKE 'INTERVIEW%' ORDER BY l.created_at DESC, l.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT admin_memo FROM interview_session WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT admin_memo FROM interview_session WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL FOR UPDATE
